title: Zero Trust Network Architecture
author: Quinn Davis
Security Architect
description: Implement zero trust with identity-based access control—but complexity creates attack surface
content:
Zero trust assumes breach and verifies every request regardless of network location.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Trust Collapse (2039)](/docs/articles/trust-collapse-2039)
